overall.description: First-person driving footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a vehicle navigating through a rainy, neon-lit dystopian city. The journey progresses from ground-level streets up a massive spiral ramp structure onto elevated highways, transitioning between open air and covered tunnel sections with heavy atmospheric fog and cyberpunk aesthetics.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy city street approaching highway ramp system

events.description: vehicle enters covered ramp structure from open street
begins ascending the spiral ramp, speed decreases slightly

agents.ego_description: driving through rain-soaked city streets approaching the highway ramp entrance

entered.detail: tall trees lining the left side of the wet street
futuristic commercial structures with illuminated windows
massive concrete highway ramp entrance with industrial architecture
glowing advertisements and signs on building facades
weathered concrete barriers lining the ramp entrance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy night in a cyberpunk city, driving along wet asphalt streets lined with sparse trees and commercial buildings. Neon billboards illuminate the left side as the vehicle approaches and enters a massive highway ramp system, transitioning from open air to the sheltered concrete environment of the ramp.

scene_state.functional_zone: massive spiral highway ramp ascent structure

events.description: continuous ascending spiral on the multi-level ramp structure
passing under heavy industrial gantries and support beams

agents.ego_description: navigating the tight ascending spiral of the massive industrial ramp structure

entered.detail: massive industrial spiral ramp with multiple levels visible above
heavy steel support structures spanning across the ramp
exposed pipes and conduits running along the ramp walls
tall brutalist concrete walls enclosing the ramp

segments.scene_description: The vehicle ascends the massive spiral ramp structure, enclosed by towering concrete walls and industrial piping. Overhead gantries and support beams crisscross above as the camera winds upward through the sheltered, artificially lit environment, gaining significant elevation above the city streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway transition approaching covered section

events.description: merging onto main elevated highway from the spiral ramp
entering covered highway section with transition to neon lighting

agents.ego_description: merging onto the elevated highway and approaching the covered tunnel section

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving parallel on the highway

entered.detail: multi-lane highway suspended high above the city
massive structural pillars supporting the highway deck
tunnel entrance with glowing blue neon trim
horizontal neon strips marking the tunnel entrance

segments.scene_description: Exiting the spiral ramp, the vehicle merges onto a wide elevated highway with support towers visible in the distance. The scene transitions from the enclosed ramp to an open elevated section before approaching a covered highway entrance marked by distinctive blue neon lights, with other futuristic vehicles visible on the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered elevated highway with cyberpunk neon lighting

events.description: passing other vehicles in the covered highway section
approaching tunnel exit with 'LITTLE CHINA' sign visible

agents.ego_description: driving through the covered highway tunnel with neon lighting

notable_agents.action: red sports car overtaking on the left side

entered.detail: smooth concrete walls with embedded lighting fixtures
continuous blue and white neon lighting along the tunnel ceiling
glowing digital advertisements on the tunnel walls
illuminated district sign indicating the Little China neighborhood

segments.scene_description: Driving through the covered highway tunnel illuminated by vibrant overhead neon strips and digital billboards. The enclosed space features smooth concrete walls and a wet road surface reflecting the artificial lighting. A 'LITTLE CHINA' sign appears on the right as the vehicle approaches the tunnel exit, with other vehicles overtaking and merging in the moderate traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: open elevated highway in heavy rain and fog

events.description: exiting tunnel back to open air with visible rain and reduced visibility
heavy rain and fog reducing visibility on the open highway

agents.ego_description: driving on the open elevated highway through heavy rain and fog

entered.detail: dark stormy sky visible above the highway
distant illuminated skyscrapers and towers in the fog
metal safety barriers along the edge of the elevated road
heavy dark clouds with rain visible in the headlights

segments.scene_description: The vehicle exits the covered tunnel back into the open air, revealing a wide elevated highway stretching through heavy rain and fog. The dark stormy sky dominates the view above, while the distant city skyline glows faintly through the haze. Rain streaks across the windshield as the vehicle continues along the rain-slicked road with sparse traffic.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive through a rainy cyberpunk city, transitioning from ground-level streets up a massive spiral ramp and through a neon-lit tunnel into a foggy elevated highway. It begins on wet asphalt streets lined with neon billboards before the vehicle enters a sheltered concrete ramp system. As the camera winds upward, the environment shifts from open air to an enclosed industrial space of towering walls and crisscrossing overhead gantries. The scene then opens onto a wide elevated highway, merging through blue neon markers and into a covered tunnel illuminated by vibrant overhead strips and digital billboards. Finally, the vehicle exits the tunnel back into the open air, where the view expands across a rain-slicked highway under a dark, stormy sky with the distant city skyline glowing through heavy fog.
